expectations.evidence: Card with shadow='sm', radius='lg', withBorder, padding='md'

expectations.text: Does not manually check color scheme for styling
expectations.evidence: No useMantineColorScheme or useMantineTheme usage - relies on Card withBorder and semantic color tokens

expectations.text: Uses classNames prop with CSS modules
expectations.evidence: classNames={{ root: classes.card }} and classNames={{ root: classes.avatar }}
Uses c='dimmed' for role text, Mantine handles theming internally

expectations.text: Uses radius and shadow props on Card
Does not use deprecated Mantine v6 props
expectations.evidence: Uses wrap='nowrap' correctly, fw prop used correctly
